question: What sea borders the country where Petra is located?

context.title: Petra
context.text: Petra is an ancient city in Jordan.

context.title: Jordan
context.text: Jordan borders the Dead Sea to the west.

question: Which mountain range contains the highest peak in the country whose capital is Kathmandu?

context.title: Kathmandu
context.text: Kathmandu is the capital of Nepal.

context.title: Nepal
context.text: Mount Everest, the highest peak in Nepal, is part of the Himalayas.

question: What language is primarily spoken in the country that invented the printing press?

context.title: Printing Press
context.text: The printing press was invented by Johannes Gutenberg in Germany.

context.title: Germany
context.text: The primary language of Germany is German.

question: Which river runs through the city that hosted the 2012 Summer Olympics?

context.title: 2012 Olympics
context.text: The 2012 Summer Olympics were held in London.

context.title: London
context.text: The River Thames runs through London.

question: Which sea does the Nile River empty into?

context.title: Nile River
context.text: The Nile River flows northward through Africa.

context.title: Mediterranean Sea
context.text: The Nile empties into the Mediterranean Sea in northern Egypt.

question: Which country did Marie Curie emigrate from to study in Paris?

context.title: Marie Curie
context.text: Marie Curie was born in Warsaw, Poland, and later moved to Paris.

context.title: Poland
context.text: Poland is a country in Central Europe.

question: What is the native language of the country that first landed on the Moon?

context.title: Moon landing
context.text: The United States was the first country to land humans on the Moon in 1969.

context.title: United States
context.text: The primary language of the United States is English.

question: What is the currency of the country that built the Panama Canal?

context.title: Panama Canal
context.text: The Panama Canal was built primarily by the United States.

context.title: United States
context.text: The United States uses the US Dollar as its currency.

question: What is the main language spoken in the country where tango originated?

context.title: Tango
context.text: Tango is a dance that originated in Argentina.

context.title: Argentina
context.text: The official language of Argentina is Spanish.

question: What river flows through the city where Shakespeare was born?

context.title: William Shakespeare
context.text: William Shakespeare was born in Stratford-upon-Avon, England.
